summary: Completed comprehensive testing of League of Legends ranking application. All core features working correctly including Riot API integration, summoner management, leaderboard display, and navigation.
passed_tests: Add summoner endpoint with valid Riot ID (Lorian#BIS)
List summoners endpoint with and without refresh
Error handling for invalid Riot ID format
Riot API integration and data refresh
Frontend leaderboard page loading and display
Navigation between Ranking and Invocadores pages
Add summoner UI functionality with example button
Summoner detail page display with all required fields
Refresh functionality on both leaderboard and detail pages
Navigation from summoner cards to detail pages
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (7/7 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (minor DOM attachment issue during navigation testing)
